zh.Grantham, Lincolnshire: 英國林可爾史爾格朗坦

zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Crioll於1220年出生在英國林可爾史爾格朗坦時，他的父親Bertram de Criol31歲，母親Emma de Sarre37歲。他於大約1259年與Joan Auberville在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1271年2月10日在英國坎布利其爾卻斯特頓享年51歲。

zh-hans.Eynsford, Dartford, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特艾斯福德

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Crioll于1220年出生在英国林可爾史爾格朗坦时，他的父亲Bertram de Criol31岁，母亲Emma de Sarre37岁。他于大约1259年与Joan Auberville在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1271年2月10日在英国坎布利其爾卻斯特頓享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crioll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: nickname from criollo ‘creole’, a term denoting a person of mixed European and black descent.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Crioll was born in 1220, in Grantham, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Bertram de Criol, was 31 and his mother, Emma de Sarre, was 37. He married Joan Auberville about 1259, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 10 February 1271, in Chesterton, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Crioll est né en 1220, à Grantham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Bertram de Criol, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Emma de Sarre, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Joan Auberville environ 1259, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 10 février 1271, à Chesterton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Crioll 1220 in Grantham, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertram de Criol 31 und seine Mutter Emma de Sarre 37. Er hat um 1259 in England, United Kingdom Joan Auberville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 10. Februar 1271 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Chesterton, Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Crioll è nato il nel 1220 nel Grantham, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Bertram de Criol, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Sarre, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Joan Auberville circa 1259, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 10 febbraio 1271, nel Chesterton, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Criollが1220年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグランサムで生まれた時，父Bertram de Criolは31歳，母Emma de Sarreは37歳であった。約1259年にイギリスイギリスでJoan Aubervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1271年2月10日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアチェステルトンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Crioll(이)가 1220년 영국 링코실르 그랜섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertram de Criol(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Sarre(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1259년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan Auberville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1271년 2월 10일 영국 캄브리지실르 체스터턴에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Crioll nasceu em 1220, em Grantham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bertram de Criol, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Sarre, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Auberville aproximadamente 1259, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1271, em Chesterton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Crioll родился в 1220 г. в местности грантам, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Bertram de Criol было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Emma de Sarre, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Auberville около 1259 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 10 февраля 1271 г. в местности честиртон, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Crioll nació en 1220, en Grantham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Bertram de Criol, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Emma de Sarre, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Joan Auberville aproximadamente 1259, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1271, en Chesterton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
